SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF 250.00 AGAINST STEPHEN H. CORNET, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-20-2004 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-04-2004. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY : MARGARET ASHWELL # 7578 (212)

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $286.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT HEWLETT
